mapper.sql:
SELECT d.document_id, d.document_no, d.partner_id, COALESCE(tp.partner_name, '-') AS partner_name, COALESCE( CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.part_name ORDER BY m.movement_id SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1), CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) > 1 THEN CONCAT(' 외 ', COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) - 1, '종') ELSE '' END ), '-' ) AS summary, COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) AS line_count, COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) AS total_unit_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waiting_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.grade = 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS defective_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR( COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) ) END AS progress_rate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN 'WAITING' ELSE 'IN_PROGRESS' END AS inspection_status, d.created_at FROM tb_stock_document d INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_no, d.partner_id, tp.partner_name, d.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS document_count, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.total_unit_count), 0) AS total_unit_count, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.completed_count), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.waiting_count), 0) AS waiting_count, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.defective_count), 0) AS defective_count FROM (
) filtered

SELECT d.document_id, d.document_no, d.partner_id, COALESCE(tp.partner_name, '-') AS partner_name, COALESCE( CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.part_name ORDER BY m.movement_id SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1), CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) > 1 THEN CONCAT(' 외 ', COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) - 1, '종') ELSE '' END ), '-' ) AS summary, COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) AS line_count, COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) AS total_unit_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waiting_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.grade = 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS defective_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR( COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) ) END AS progress_rate, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN 'WAITING' ELSE 'IN_PROGRESS' END AS inspection_status, d.created_at FROM tb_stock_document d INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id WHERE d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.document_id = #{documentId} AND d.document_type = 'INBOUND' AND d.document_status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.movement_status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_no, d.partner_id, tp.partner_name, d.created_at

SELECT m.movement_id, m.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.part_code, COUNT(DISTINCT u.unit_id) AS quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waiting_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.grade = 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS defective_count FROM tb_stock_movement m INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.movement_status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY m.movement_id, m.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.part_code ORDER BY m.movement_id ASC

SELECT m.movement_id, m.part_id, u.unit_id, u.internal_serial_no, u.manufacturer_serial_no, u.unit_status, u.inspection_status, u.grade, u.sales_status, li.inspection_id AS latest_inspection_id, li.inspection_type AS latest_inspection_type, li.result AS latest_inspection_result, li.inspected_at AS latest_inspected_at FROM tb_stock_movement m INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id LEFT JOIN tb_inspection li ON li.company_id = u.company_id AND li.unit_id = u.unit_id AND li.inspection_id = ( SELECT i2.inspection_id FROM tb_inspection i2 WHERE i2.company_id = u.company_id AND i2.unit_id = u.unit_id ORDER BY i2.inspected_at DESC, i2.inspection_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.movement_status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND u.active = TRUE AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY m.movement_id ASC, u.unit_id ASC
mapper.sql: SELECT i.inspection_id, i.inspection_type, i.original_inspection_id, ( SELECT d.document_id FROM tb_stock_movement_unit mu INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.movement_id = mu.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_stock_document d ON d.company_id = m.company_id AND d.document_id = m.document_id WHERE mu.unit_id = i.unit_id AND m.company_id = i.company_id AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.document_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS document_id, ( SELECT d.document_no FROM tb_stock_movement_unit mu INNER JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.movement_id = mu.movement_id INNER JOIN tb_stock_document d ON d.company_id = m.company_id AND d.document_id = m.document_id WHERE mu.unit_id = i.unit_id AND m.company_id = i.company_id AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.document_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS document_no, i.unit_id, u.internal_serial_no, p.part_id, p.part_name, p.model_name, i.template_id, t.template_name, i.result, i.grade, i.sales_status, i.memo, COALESCE(mb.name, '-') AS inspected_by_name, i.inspected_at FROM tb_inspection i INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = i.company_id AND u.unit_id = i.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id LEFT JOIN tb_inspection_template t ON t.company_id = i.company_id AND t.template_id = i.template_id LEFT JOIN tb_member mb ON mb.company_id = i.company_id AND mb.member_id = i.inspected_by
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_inspection i INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = i.company_id AND u.unit_id = i.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.inspection_type = 'INITIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS initial_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.inspection_type = 'CORRECTION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.inspection_type = 'REINSPECTION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS reinspection_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.result = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fail_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN i.grade = 'DEFECTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS defective_count FROM tb_inspection i INNER JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = i.company_id AND u.unit_id = i.unit_id INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id

SELECT item_result_id, inspection_id, item_id, item_name_snapshot, result, value_text, value_number, selected_option_id, selected_option_label_snapshot, selected_option_value_snapshot, memo FROM tb_inspection_item_result WHERE inspection_id = #{inspectionId} ORDER BY item_result_id ASC

SELECT inspection_id, company_id, unit_id, template_id, inspected_by, inspection_type, original_inspection_id, sales_status, result, grade, memo, inspected_at FROM tb_inspection WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND inspection_id = #{inspectionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.unit_id, u.company_id, u.part_id, p.category_id, u.internal_serial_no, u.unit_status, u.grade, u.inspection_status, u.sales_status, u.active FROM tb_pc_part_unit u INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.unit_id = #{unitId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT template_id, company_id, category_id, template_name, version, active, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_inspection_template WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND template_id = #{templateId} AND active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT item_id, template_id, item_group, item_name, input_type, required, sort_order, grade_impact, fail_policy, active FROM tb_inspection_template_item WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND active = TRUE ORDER BY item_group ASC, sort_order ASC, item_id ASC

SELECT option_id, item_id, option_label, option_value, active FROM tb_inspection_template_item_option WHERE item_id IN ( SELECT item_id FROM tb_inspection_template_item WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND active = TRUE ) AND active = TRUE ORDER BY item_id ASC, sort_order ASC, option_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_inspection ( company_id, unit_id, template_id, inspected_by, inspection_type, original_inspection_id, sales_status, result, grade, memo, inspected_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{unitId}, #{templateId}, #{inspectedBy}, #{inspectionType}, #{originalInspectionId}, #{salesStatus}, #{result}, #{grade}, #{memo}, #{inspectedAt} )

INSERT INTO tb_inspection_item_result ( inspection_id, item_id, item_name_snapshot, result, value_text, value_number, selected_option_id, selected_option_label_snapshot, selected_option_value_snapshot, memo ) VALUES ( #{inspectionId}, #{itemId}, #{itemNameSnapshot}, #{result}, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{selectedOptionId}, #{selectedOptionLabelSnapshot}, #{selectedOptionValueSnapshot}, #{memo} )

INSERT INTO tb_part_status_history ( company_id, unit_id, changed_by, from_inspection_status, to_inspection_status, from_grade, to_grade, from_sales_status, to_sales_status, reason ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{unitId}, #{changedBy}, #{fromInspectionStatus}, #{toInspectionStatus}, #{fromGrade}, #{toGrade}, #{fromSalesStatus}, #{toSalesStatus}, #{reason} )
